items.headline: Meta must pay $375 million for violating New Mexico law in child exploitation case, jury rules
items.summary: Jury reaches a verdict in New Mexico trial in which the state's attorney general alleged that Meta failed to safeguard its family of apps from child predators.

items.headline: OpenAI raises additional money to bring record funding round to $120 billion, CFO tells Cramer

items.headline: Elizabeth Warren raises concerns over MrBeast’s teen banking app — and its connection to a troubled bank
